failure.detail: Vite build error: Failed to resolve entry for package 'react-datetime-picker'. Package exports field points to ./dist/index.js but only ./dist/esm/index.js exists. Package.json exports misconfigured for this commit.

notes: Vite error overlay: [plugin:vite:import-analysis] Failed to resolve entry for package react-datetime-picker. The package.json exports '.' points to ./dist/index.js which does not exist; only ./dist/esm/index.js and ./dist/cjs/index.js are present.
